mapper.sql: 0 AS CASE_SEQ, SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SSPS_TYP_CD, SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD, RPR_PRGRS_CCD, DL_P_RNMCNO, RSK_MRK, RSK_GRD_CD, OK_CCD, SCNR_MRK, AI_RESULT, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT
mapper.select: SELECT 0 AS CASE_SEQ, SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SSPS_TYP_CD, SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD, RPR_PRGRS_CCD, DL_P_RNMCNO, RSK_MRK, RSK_GRD_CD, OK_CCD, SCNR_MRK, AI_RESULT, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_ID = #{caseId} LIMIT 1

SELECT 0 AS CASE_SEQ, SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SSPS_TYP_CD, SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD, RPR_PRGRS_CCD, DL_P_RNMCNO, RSK_MRK, RSK_GRD_CD, OK_CCD, SCNR_MRK, AI_RESULT, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_ID = #{caseNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC66B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD, RPR_PRGRS_CCD, DL_P_RNMCNO, RSK_GRD_CD, OK_CCD, AI_RESULT, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{openDt}, #{caseNo}, #{caseTpCd}, #{caseStCd}, #{custNo}, #{priorityCd}, #{strYn}, #{remark}, #{regId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC66B SET RPR_PRGRS_CCD = #{caseStCd}, RSK_GRD_CD = #{priorityCd}, OK_CCD = #{strYn}, AI_RESULT = #{remark}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE SSPS_DL_ID = #{caseNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC89B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SEQ_NO, CNSLT_CNTNT, REG_ID, REG_DT ) SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, COALESCE((SELECT MAX(SEQ_NO) + 1 FROM NIC89B WHERE SSPS_DL_ID = #{caseId}), 1), #{cmtText}, #{regId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_ID = #{caseId} LIMIT 1
mapper.select: SELECT SEQ_NO, SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_ID_REF, CNSLT_CNTNT, REG_ID, REG_DT FROM NIC89B WHERE SSPS_DL_ID = #{caseId} ORDER BY REG_DT ASC
